title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget amounting to Thirty Million Seventy-One Thousand Fifty-One Pesos and 00/100 (Php 30,071,051.00) chargeable against the Personal Services Savings, Maintenance and Other Operating Expense (MOOE) Savings, grant from the Provincial Government and the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund (MDRRMF).
